MODULE: cosmos.integration.cad.engine
FILE: cosmos/integration/cad/engine.py (179 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos CAD Engine.

CadQuery-based parametric modeling.

CLASSES:
- CosmosCAD: CAD modeling engine using CadQuery.

Provides a high-level API for creating 3D m
  Methods: def create_box(self, length: float, width: float, height: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def create_cylinder(self, radius: float, height: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def create_sphere(self, radius: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def extrude(self, height: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def fillet(self, radius: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def chamfer(self, size: float) -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def cut(self, tool: 'cq.Workplane') -> 'cq.Workplane'
  Methods: def union(self, other: 'cq.Workplane') -> 'cq.Workplane'
